# Net-SNMP Binaries

This folder contains the original third-party SNMP binaries used by this project.

## Files

- `netsnmp.dll`
- `snmpwalk.exe`

The matching Base64 text files are stored in `..\b64`.
They can be regenerated with `..\..\build\Convert-NetSnmpBinariesToBase64.ps1`.

## Source

The binaries were taken from the Net-SNMP project.

- Package: `net-snmp-5.5-2.x64.exe`
- Website: <http://www.net-snmp.org/>
- Documentation: <http://www.net-snmp.org/docs/>

Please review the Net-SNMP license and terms before redistributing or reusing these files.
